LAW AND MOTION 302, RULING - A R G U E D; DEFENDANT RUTH CUSING'S MOTION TO DISMISS FOR LACK OF PROSECUTION IS GRANTED. PLAINTIFF DID NOT BRING THIS ACTION TO TRIAL WITHIN 5 YEARS OF FILING THE ACTION ON JUNE 6, 2007. (CCP 583.310.) PLAINTIFF HAS NOT DEMONSTRATED THAT THE 5 YEAR PERIOD SHOULD BE TOLLED ON ANY OF THE GROUNDS ENUMERATED IN CCP 583.340. THEREFORE, DISMISSAL IS MANDATORY. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: ERNEST GOLDSMITH; CLERK: CYNTHIA HERBERT; COURT REPORTER: ANTHONY VAUGHN, CSR # 6185

LAW AND MOTION, 302, RULING - A R G U E D; THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING. PLAINTIFF MARILOU SAMSON'S MOTION FOR RECONSIDERATION OF ORDER RE: MOTION TO DISMISS FOR LACK OF PROSECUTION [CCP 1008] IS DENIED. MS. SAMSON HAS NEITHER PRESENTED NEW FACTS OR NEW LAW THAT WARRANTS RECONSIDERATION. (CCP 1008.) NEITHER MS. SAMSON'S DIFFICULTY WITH HER REPRESENTATION BY COUNSEL NOR THE DEFENDANTS' DEFAULT IS A GROUND FOR TOLLING THE FIVE YEAR PERIOD TO BRING AN ACTION TO TRIAL. (CCP 583.340.) ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. Notice Of Motion And Motion For Reconsideration Fo Roder Re: Motion To Dismiss For Lack Of Prosecution [Ccp 1008]
Off Calendar Jul-09-2013 Denied
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES - MARILOU SAMSON, TEL. NO. 583-1636, PLAINTIFF APPEARING IN PRO PER;
ATTY. PATRICK D. GOGGIN, TEL. NO. 981-9290 APPEARING FOR THE DEFENDANT CUSING;
ATTY. MICHAEL L. BOLI, TEL. NO. (510) 535-9001 APPEARING FOR THE DEFENDANTS TAYAKA.

RULING - A R G U E D; The Court adopted its tentative ruling. PLAINTIFF MARILOU SAMSON's Motion For Reconsideration of order Re: Motion To Dismiss For Lack Of Prosecution [Ccp 1008] is Denied. Ms. Samson has neither presented new facts or new law that warrants reconsideration. (CCP 1008.) Neither Ms. Samson's difficulty with her representation by counsel nor the defendants' default is a ground for tolling the five year period to bring an action to trial. (CCP 583.340.) ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith, Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Court Reporter: Anthony Vaughn, CSR # 6185 =(302/EHG)

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Dismiss For Lack Of Prosecution
Off Calendar May-16-2013 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES - MARILOU SAMSON, TEL. NO. 759-8710, PLAINTIFF APPEARING IN PRO PER;
ATTY. PATRICK D. GOGGIN, TEL. NO. 981-9290 APPEARING FOR THE DEFENDANT;
ATTY. MICHAEL BOLI, TEL. NO. (510) 539-9001 EXT. 1 APPEARING FOR THE DEFENDANT TANAKA DEFENDANTS.

RULING - A R G U E D; DEFENDANT RUTH CUSING'S Motion To Dismiss For Lack Of Prosecution is Granted. Plaintiff did not bring this action to trial within 5 years of filing the action on June 6, 2007. (CCP 583.310.) Plaintiff has not demonstrated that the 5 year period should be tolled on any of the grounds enumerated in CCP 583.340. Therefore, dismissal is mandatory. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. Judge: Ernest Goldsmith; Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Court Reporter: Anthony Vaughn, CSR # 6185 =(302/EHG)
